---
name: UI Polish
about: Track a UI or interaction refinement task for the Research Dossier Platform
title: "[DOS-UI] "
labels: ["mvp", "ui", "design"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the UI surface being improved and why it matters.

## Goal

State the interaction or visual quality outcome this ticket should achieve.

## Scope

- Name the screen, component, or interaction being refined.
- Include the design-system or motion work required.
- Keep the work small enough to land in one day.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The UI matches the product spec's visual direction.
- The interaction feels intentional and stable.
- Empty, loading, and success states are handled if relevant.

## Dependencies

- List upstream tickets or write `None`.

## Validation

- Include before/after screenshots, manual QA steps, or visual checks.

## Notes

Add aesthetic constraints, motion rules, or follow-up polish ideas if needed.
